2604.23854.title: Does Machine Unlearning Preserve Clinical Safety? A Risk Analysis for Medical Image Classification
2604.23854.paper_summary: The application of Deep Learning in medical diagnosis must balance patient safety with compliance with data protection regulations. Machine Unlearning enables the selective removal of training data from deployed models. However, most methods are validated primarily through efficiency and privacy-oriented metrics, with limited attention to clinically asymmetric error costs. In this work, we investigate how unlearning affects clinical risk in binary medical image classification. We show that standard unlearning strategies (Fine-Tuning, Random Labeling, and SalUn) may reduce test utility while increasing false-negative rates, thereby amplifying clinical risk. To mitigate this, we propose SalUn-CRA (Clinical Risk-Aware), a variant of SalUn that replaces random relabeling with entropy-based forgetting for malignant samples in the forget set, preventing the model from learning harmful benign associations. We evaluate on DermaMNIST and PathMNIST medical image datasets under 20% and 50% data removal. Using Global Risk metrics with asymmetric costs, SalUn-CRA achieves lower or comparable clinical risk to full retraining while preserving unlearning effectiveness. These results suggest that clinical risk should be an integral component of unlearning validation in medical systems.
2604.23854.paper_summary_zh: 深度學習在醫療診斷中的應用必須在患者安全與遵守數據保護法規之間取得平衡。機器遺忘使得從已部署模型中選擇性移除訓練數據成為可能。然而，大多數方法主要通過效率和隱私導向的指標進行驗證，對臨床不對稱錯誤成本的關注有限。在本研究中，我們探討了遺忘如何影響二元醫療影像分類中的臨床風險。我們顯示，標準的遺忘策略（微調、隨機標記和SalUn）可能會降低測試效用，同時增加假陰性率，從而加大臨床風險。為了減輕這一問題，我們提出了SalUn-CRA（臨床風險感知），這是一種SalUn的變體，將隨機重新標記替換為基於熵的遺忘，針對忘記集中的惡性樣本，防止模型學習有害的良性關聯。我們在DermaMNIST和PathMNIST醫療影像數據集上進行評估，數據移除比例為20%和50%。使用具有不對稱成本的全球風險指標，SalUn-CRA在保持遺忘效果的同時，實現了較低或可比於完全重新訓練的臨床風險。這些結果表明，臨床風險應該是醫療系統中遺忘驗證的一個重要組成部分。
2604.23854.author: Andreza M. C. Falcao et.al.
2604.23854.authors: Andreza M. C. Falcao, Filipe R. Cordeiro
